questions.question:
Which of the following is TRUE?



Databases: NIELIT 2017 DEC Scientist B
options: Every relation in \( 3 \)NF is also in BCNF
A relation R is in \( 3 \)NF if every non-prime attribute of R is fully functionally dependent on every key of R
Every relation in BCNF is also in \( 3 \)NF
No relation can be in both BCNF and \( 3 \)NF.
questions.correct_answer: Every relation in BCNF is also in \( 3 \)NF

questions.question:
Consider the relational schema \( \text{R(A B C D)} \) with following functional dependency set \( F=\{A\rightarrow BC,C\rightarrow D\}; \) The relation \( \text{R} \) is in 



Databases: NIELIT 2017 DEC Scientist B
